title: Dupontia pelligera
taxonomy: Dupontia pelligera is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. It is a member of the genus Dupontia. This species is native to the Falkland Islands and South Georgia. Within the Poaceae family, Dupontia pelligera is further classified as a type of grass that thrives in coastal areas. The specific classification of Dupontia pelligera is further detailed under the kingdom Plantae.
